'''chanate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:babblingly|babblingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-n-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:babblingly|babblingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chanate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chanate|chanate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chanatesher|chanatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chanatesherĂ«m|chanatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chanatero|chanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chanateshĂ«|chanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chanateshĂ«m|chanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichanatero|gokichanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichanateshĂ«|gokichanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichanateshĂ«m|gokichanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochanankerom|gochanankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochanankeshĂ«|gochanankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochanankeshĂ«m|gochanankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochanankeya|gochanankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chanaterom|chanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chanatemu|chanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chanateya|chanateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichanaterom|gokichanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichanatemu|gokichanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichanateya|gokichanateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chananate|chananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chananatesher|chananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chananatesherĂ«m|chananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chananatero|chananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chananateshĂ«|chananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chananateshĂ«m|chananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichananatero|gokichananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichananateshĂ«|gokichananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichananateshĂ«m|gokichananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochananankerom|gochananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochananankeshĂ«|gochananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochananankeshĂ«m|gochananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochananankeya|gochananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chananaterom|chananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chananatemu|chananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chananateya|chananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichananaterom|gokichananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichananatemu|gokichananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichananateya|gokichananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠnĂŠte|chĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠnĂŠtesher|chĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠnĂŠtero|chĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠnĂŠtero|gokichĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠnĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠnĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠnĂŠterom|chĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠnĂŠtemu|chĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠnĂŠteya|chĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠnĂŠterom|gokichĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠnĂŠteya|gokichĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafnafte|chafnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafnaftesher|chafnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafnaftesherĂ«m|chafnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafnaftero|chafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafnafteshĂ«|chafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafnafteshĂ«m|chafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafnaftero|gokichafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafnafteshĂ«|gokichafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafnafteshĂ«m|gokichafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafnafnkerom|gochafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafnafnkeshĂ«|gochafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafnafnkeshĂ«m|gochafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafnafnkeya|gochafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafnafterom|chafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafnaftemu|chafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafnafteya|chafnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafnafterom|gokichafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafnaftemu|gokichafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafnafteya|gokichafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
